products.name: Sony PXW-Z90 4K HD Compact NXCAM Camcorder
products.description: Sony PXW-Z90 4K HD Compact NXCAM Camcorder

products.name: Portable Drive 1TB Seagate
products.description: The Seagate Portable Drive 1TB is a compact and reliable external hard drive designed for easy data storage and backup. It features plug-and-play functionality, fast USB 3.0 transfer speeds, and is ideal for storing documents, photos, videos, and backups on the go.
products.specifications:
Storage Capacity: 1TB
Type: External Portable HDD
Interface: USB 3.0 (backward compatible with USB 2.0)
Data Transfer: High-speed file transfer
Compatibility: Windows & Mac (reformatting may be required for Mac)
Power Supply: USB-powered (no external adapter needed)
Setup: Plug & play (no software installation required)
Design: Slim, lightweight, portable

products.name: Lightwave money counter
products.description: Lightwave Money Counter, high-speed banknote counting machine with UV/MG counterfeit detection, counting speed up to 1,000 notes/min, automatic start/stop, batch and add functions, LED display, and capacity of approx. 200 notes hopper / 200 notes stacker, suitable for multi-currency use.

products.name: canon all in one printer
products.description: canon pixma all in one printer - print,copy and scan

products.name: hp omnibook 5 flip core 7
products.description: hp omnibook 5 flip core 7 16GB RAM,512GB SSD

products.name: Smart Watch Series 7
products.description: Experience the next level of connectivity with the Smart Watch Series 7.

products.name: Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Immerse yourself in music without distractions.

products.name: Cotton Linen Summer Shirt
products.description: Breathable, lightweight cotton linen fabric perfect for the Rwandan climate.
